bids.reasoning: At the start of the negotiation, I am targeting maximum utility because there is no time pressure to concede yet. With no opponent offers or messages, I have no evidence about their priorities, so I will open with my highest-value bid across all issues.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.973) because it is still the very start of the negotiation and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the worst possible bid for my preferences and shows no real concession pattern yet. I will make a small concession on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.95 because it is still very early in the negotiation and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeated the all-valueA offer, which is very poor for me and shows no concession so far, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and D.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 by conceding only on my lowest-weight issue, issueA, while holding firm on the much more important issues B, C, and D. Time is still very early at t=0.06, and the opponent has not conceded at all from their all-valueA position, so there is no reason yet to make major concessions on my high-weight issues. With no messages to interpret, I rely only on the offer pattern and make a small additional concession to test movement.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866, since it is still very early at t=0.08 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueA with no concession, so I am holding firm on the most important issues C and D while conceding next on issueB after already giving issueA fully.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.81 because it is still early (t=0.10), so I should not concede much on the high-weight issues C and D. The opponent has mostly held at valueA for everything but just moved issueD to valueB, so I read only minimal concession and will make a small additional concession on lower-weight issueB while preserving my priorities.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.76 because it is early in the negotiation and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held firm at valueA on all issues, with only a small move to valueB on issueD, so I will concede on lower-weight issues A and B while protecting my most important issues C and D.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.68, conceding only on issueC while preserving my most important issueD at valueD. Since it is still early at t=0.14, I should not move close to the opponent’s very low offers yet; their history shows they mostly held at valueA with only a small concession to valueB on issueD, and there are no messages to adjust that assessment.

I am targeting about 0.60 utility by keeping my most important issueD at valueD while conceding on lower-weight issues and moving issueC to valueB, which the opponent has recently signaled. Since it is still early at t=0.16, I should not concede issueD yet, especially because the opponent’s offers remain low-utility to me and show only limited concession.

I targeted a still-positive utility around 0.52 by holding firm on issueD, my most important issue, while conceding further on lower/medium issues to test for movement. At t=0.18 it is still early, so I should not concede issueD much yet; the opponent’s offers remain very low for me and show only limited, inconsistent concession.

I am targeting a moderate utility while still protecting issueD, my highest-weight issue, because it is still early at t=0.20 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me. The opponent has shown only small concessions, most recently moving issueB to valueB, so I will incorporate that signal while continuing to ask for valueD on issueD.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.655, since it is still early enough to protect the most important issueD while making concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held firm near valueA, with small movement on issueB and issueC, so I am combining their signaled concessions there while keeping issueD at my top value. There are no messages to weigh, and this avoids repeating my previous exact bid.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.60 while still protecting issueD, my highest-weight issue. At t=0.24 there is still time, but the opponent’s latest bid finally conceded on issueD to valueC, so I will keep issueD at valueD while conceding the lower-weight issueB back to valueA and offering issueC at valueB.

I am targeting a utility around 0.57, keeping value on the most important issues while making a meaningful concession on issueD compared with my prior insistence on valueD. At t=0.26 there is still time, but the opponent has repeatedly offered low values and only modestly improved issueC/issueD, so I am testing a tradeoff rather than dropping too far. Their latest valid offer still gives me low utility, so I will concede on issueD to valueC while asking for issueC at valueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.55, slightly below my previous offer, because we are still before the midpoint but the opponent has been moving only slowly from very low-utility bids for me. Their recent offers suggest some willingness on issueC and occasional movement on issueB/issueD, so I am holding issueD at valueC while conceding issueC to valueB and asking for valueB on the lower-weight issueB.

I am targeting a utility around 0.57, which is a moderate concession from my ideal while still protecting the high-weight issueD. At t=0.30 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low offers; their bids show only limited and inconsistent concessions, mainly sometimes on issueC or issueD, so I am combining concessions on lower-weight issues with valueC on the two more important issues.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.55, since we are still only at t=0.32 and should not concede to the opponent’s low offers too quickly. The opponent has gradually shown willingness to move on issueB, issueC, and issueD, but their bids to me remain well below my recent offers, so I am combining concessions they have signaled while holding issueD at valueC because it is my most important issue.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.57, still well above reservation while conceding on lower-weight issueA and issueB. The opponent has mostly held very low offers for me but has at least signaled some willingness on issueD=valueC and issueC=valueC, so I am preserving value on the high-weight issueD while offering concessions elsewhere. Since time is only 0.34, I do not need to drop to their latest low-utility bid yet.

I targeted a moderate utility around 0.60, keeping stronger positions on the high-weight issues C and D while only making small movement on low-weight A/B. Time is still mid-early at 0.36, so I do not need to match the opponent’s low offers yet; their latest bids show some concession on C/D, but they are still holding many values unfavorable to me.

I am targeting about 0.60 utility, since we are still before the midpoint and the opponent’s offers remain much lower for me despite some small concessions. The opponent has most recently moved on issueB but continues to press low values on issueA/issueC/issueD, so I concede on lower-weight issueA and partly on issueC while holding issueD at valueC because it is my highest-weight issue. There are no natural-language messages to weigh.

I targeted a moderate mid-game utility around 0.55, conceding further from my last offer while preserving value on the most important issueD. The opponent has gradually moved from all valueA to offering issueD:valueC and issueB:valueB, so I am matching those signals while asking for a small improvement on issueC. There are no natural-language messages to factor in.

I am targeting about 0.49 utility, a moderate concession from my last offer while still preserving value on the most important issueD. Time is approaching mid-negotiation, and the opponent’s offers have improved from all valueA to a latest bid worth about 0.44 to me, so I am matching their movement by conceding issueB while holding issueD at valueC. There are no opponent messages, and all prior offers use valid domain values.
